emails.subject: enovate exchange agreements
emails.body: enovate exchange agreements Dan, I understand that Jeff Hodge has forwarded the terms of the storage exchanges to you for confirmation. There may be a couple of item to clarify within the terms. First, under the "late notification" section please change the forst sentence to read: Late nominations available by 3:30 pm on the nomination day prior to gas flow. Also, change the last sentence under 'Payment Terms" to read: Oneok will pay each month $72,916.67 to enovate by the 25th day of the month following the service month. Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks Steve RIchman 312-541-1233

emails.subject: Re: enovate exchange agreements
emails.body: Re: enovate exchange agreements Steve, I made the same change to both Oneok and PG&E regarding payment following the service month. Is this correct. Please check each document and if okay, please forward to the counterparty for their execution and return.
